name: 16oz Stoneware HELLO SUNSHINE Mug - Room Essentials™
description:
Kickstart your morning routine with a cup of tea, coffee or any other drink in the 16-Ounce Stoneware Hello Sunshine Mug from Room Essentials™. This printed mug features the message "Hello Sunshine" along with an image of the sun and a brown handle to contrast the neutral backdrop for an appealing look. Made of stoneware, the mug is suitable for both hot and cold beverages, and can be tossed in the dishwasher for easy cleanup.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
